_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-05-29 23:12:30Z)**_

No security vulnerabilities found.

The diff is confined to `docs/vercel_mockup/src/MOCKUP.jsx`, a mockup file. Changes:
1. A new hardcoded mock passenger record (`bp_gh1`) added to the in-component `useState` seed data — entirely static literals, no external input.
2. JSX restructuring (wrapping the existing row in an extra `<div>`) — purely presentational.
3. A new conditional info block rendering `p.passengerType`, `p.agency`, `p.reasonForTravel` as React text children.

All rendered values come from the same in-file `useState` seed, and React auto-escapes text children — no `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`, no URL/script/event-handler sinks, no shell/SQL/path/HTTP sinks, no authn/authz logic, no parsers/validators, no logging of sensitive fields. The PII-shaped fields (name, ID number, phone, agency, reason) are hardcoded sample data rendered visibly to a staff-facing screen by design — not exfiltrated to logs/telemetry. No entry point or sink is introduced or modified.
